title: Logo round 2 — bulb × bubble, neon purple
prompt: Per your round-1 pick (Classic bulb + Idea in a bubble) and “neon purple”: 10 mashups of those two parents, from literal to abstract. Select the keepers, note tweaks per option, mark ⚡ remix pairs, and dial in the glow.

options.label: Bulb in a bubble
options.description: The literal mashup — idea inside the conversation
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 12a4 4 0 0 1 4-4h24a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v16a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H22l-8 8v-8h-2a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V12Z"/><path d="M24 11a6.5 6.5 0 0 0-3.8 11.7c.9.7 1.8 1.5 1.8 2.6v.7h4v-.7c0-1.1.9-1.9 1.8-2.6A6.5 6.5 0 0 0 24 11Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M22.5 29h3" stroke="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: Bubble as the glass
options.description: The chat bubble IS the bulb — filament inside, base below
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M14 8h20a5 5 0 0 1 5 5v10a5 5 0 0 1-5 5h-9l-5 5v-5h-6a5 5 0 0 1-5-5V13a5 5 0 0 1 5-5Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="24" cy="18" r="3.5"/><path d="M20 39h8M22 43h4"/></svg>

options.label: Speaking bulb
options.description: Classic bulb that grew a speech tail — the idea talks
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 6a12 12 0 0 0-7 21.5c1.6 1.3 3 3 3 5v1.5h8V32.5c0-2 1.4-3.7 3-5A12 12 0 0 0 24 6Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M13.5 22.5 6 27l7-1" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M20 39h8M22 43h4"/></svg>

options.label: Typing filament
options.description: Filament replaced by a chat “typing” ellipsis
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 6a12 12 0 0 0-7 21.5c1.6 1.3 3 3 3 5v1.5h8V32.5c0-2 1.4-3.7 3-5A12 12 0 0 0 24 6Z"/><path d="M20 39h8M22 43h4"/><circle cx="18" cy="20" r="1.6" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><circle cx="24" cy="20" r="1.6" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><circle cx="30" cy="20" r="1.6" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/></svg>

options.label: Exchange of sparks
options.description: Two bubbles trading — the reply carries the spark
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="7" y="7" width="22" height="15" rx="5"/><rect x="19" y="24" width="22" height="15" rx="5" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M30 28v7M26.5 31.5h7" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="14" cy="14.5" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="19" cy="14.5" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/><circle cx="24" cy="14.5" r="1.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>

options.label: Bulb with reply badge
options.description: Bulb primary, tiny bubble as a notification badge
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M22 8a11 11 0 0 0-6.4 19.7c1.5 1.2 2.7 2.8 2.7 4.6V34h7.4v-1.7c0-1.8 1.2-3.4 2.7-4.6A11 11 0 0 0 22 8Z"/><path d="M18.5 38.5h7M20.5 42.5h3"/><path d="M31 6h8a3 3 0 0 1 3 3v5a3 3 0 0 1-3 3h-3l-4 4v-4a3 3 0 0 1-3-3V9a3 3 0 0 1 2-2.8" stroke="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: Neon sign
options.description: The bulb as a glowing neon tube — full commitment to neon
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 6a12 12 0 0 0-7 21.5c1.6 1.3 3 3 3 5v1.5h8V32.5c0-2 1.4-3.7 3-5A12 12 0 0 0 24 6Z" stroke="#a855f7" stroke-width="7" opacity="0.25"/><path d="M24 6a12 12 0 0 0-7 21.5c1.6 1.3 3 3 3 5v1.5h8V32.5c0-2 1.4-3.7 3-5A12 12 0 0 0 24 6Z" stroke="#a855f7"/><path d="M20 39h8M22 43h4" stroke="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: App tile
options.description: Filled neon tile, bulb knocked out — reads at 16px
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="5" y="5" width="38" height="38" rx="10" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/><path d="M24 12a8.5 8.5 0 0 0-5 15.3c1.1.9 2 2 2 3.4v1h6v-1c0-1.4.9-2.5 2-3.4A8.5 8.5 0 0 0 24 12Z" stroke="white"/><path d="M21.5 35.5h5" stroke="white"/></svg>

options.label: Radiating bubbles
options.description: The bulb’s rays are tiny thought bubbles — ideas escaping
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M24 12a10 10 0 0 0-5.8 18c1.3 1.1 2.3 2.5 2.3 4.2V36h7v-1.8c0-1.7 1-3.1 2.3-4.2A10 10 0 0 0 24 12Z"/><path d="M20.5 40.5h7M22.5 44.5h3"/><circle cx="24" cy="4.5" r="2" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="9" cy="10" r="2" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="39" cy="10" r="2" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="5.5" cy="24" r="2" stroke="#a855f7"/><circle cx="42.5" cy="24" r="2" stroke="#a855f7"/></svg>

options.label: Minimal: bubble + glow
options.description: Just a bubble and a glowing point — quietest read
options.svg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 12a4 4 0 0 1 4-4h24a4 4 0 0 1 4 4v16a4 4 0 0 1-4 4H22l-8 8v-8h-2a4 4 0 0 1-4-4V12Z"/><circle cx="24" cy="18" r="7" fill="#a855f7" opacity="0.25" stroke="none"/><circle cx="24" cy="18" r="3.2" fill="#a855f7" stroke="none"/></svg>

survey.elaborationPrompt: Which direction wins, and what should round 3 change?
